rulings.Case Title: GEORGE J. GROVER JR. et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INDIVIDUALLY AND et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2007, LINE 4. DEFENDANT JOHN HICKEY'S (FROM CASE #455745) MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is denied. There are triable issues of fact related to the cause of plaintiff's injury, when that cause of action accrued, and conflicting opinions by experts on the cause and prognosis of plaintiff's injury. =(302/PJM/VC)

rulings.Case Title: MARK B HOFFMAN VS. ANN FAY BARRY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2007, LINE 12. DEFENDANT ANN BARRY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is overruled with 10 days to answer. The Court finds that the decision in Templeton Development Corp. vs. Superior Court (2006) 144 Cal App 4th 1073 controls in that seeking mediation is not a condition precedent to filing suit. The agreement between the parties does not state that the provision is a condition precedent or state a consequence for the failure to comply. Given that defendant drafted the agreement, any ambiguity must be construed against the drafter. Like any other contractual provision, this term may be excused or found not to be material. Here, plaintiff has demonstrated an ability to plead facts that would obviate any alleged harm to defendant by the delay, if any, in seeking mediation under the holding of Templeton. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: HORNBLOWER CRUISES AND EVENTS VS. CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANTS BAY AREA AIR QUALITY MANAGEMENT DISTRICT and DAVID BURCH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer the negligence claim. Plaintiff has withdrawn the inverse condemnation claim against Hickey. On the face of the complaint, it cannot be determined whether Hickey was acting in an administrative or discretionary capacity. =(302/PJM/AY)

rulings.Case Title: HORNBLOWER CRUISES AND EVENTS VS. CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: SET FOR HEARING ON THURSDAY, OCTOBER 4, 2007, LINE 13. DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA AIR RESOURCES BOARD'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is overruled, 10 days to answer. Even if the Court takes judicial notice of the guidelines, the demurrer is overruled. Both the complaint and the guidelines set forth a role for defendant in the program and the complaint alleges that Hickey is an agent for both. =(302/PJM/AY)
